title: Phase 5 Design Documents
description:
This folder holds detailed Phase 5 MCP server design documents that would make docs/SPEC.md too long if kept in the top-level contract.
docs/SPEC.md remains the canonical product..

page.humanSummary:
This folder holds detailed Phase 5 MCP server design documents that would make docs/SPEC.md too long if kept in the top-level contract.
docs/SPEC.md remains the canonical product..
page.agentSummary: Read docs/superpowers/specs/phase-5/README.md and this Stenc spec before changing related Vault Graph behavior.

body.goal:
This folder holds detailed Phase 5 MCP server design documents that would make docs/SPEC.md too long if kept in the top-level contract.
docs/SPEC.md remains the canonical product and architecture contract. Files in this folder explain how Phase 5 should expose Vault Graph to agents through MCP while preserving the read-only, rebuildable, evidence-first boundary over Vault.
body.problem:

docs/SPEC.md remains the canonical product and architecture contract. Files in this folder explain how Phase 5 should expose Vault Graph to agents through MCP while preserving the read-only, rebuildable, evidence-first boundary over Vault.

in: Structured Stenc view of the source spec Markdown.
out: Replacing or deleting the original Markdown source.

requirements.title: Overview
requirements.detail:
This folder holds detailed Phase 5 MCP server design documents that would make docs/SPEC.md too long if kept in the top-level contract.
docs/SPEC.md remains the canonical product and architecture contract. Files in this folder explain how Phase 5 should expose Vault Graph to agents through MCP while preserving the read-only, rebuildable, evidence-first boundary over Vault.
acceptanceCriteria: Review the Overview section in the source Markdown.

requirements.title: Documents
requirements.detail: | File | Role | | --- | --- | | 2026-06-15-phase-5-mcp-server-overview-design.md | Cross-slice overview, invariants, service-backed tool policy, and handoff map | | 2026-06-15-phase-5a-mcp-server-foundation-stdio-design.md | Local stdio server foundation, service construction, error mapping, and Codex configuration examples | | 2026-06-15-phase-5b-mcp-resources-context-pack-resources-design.md | Read-only resource templates, URI validation, resource rendering, and generated context-pack resource cache | | 2026-06-15-phase-5c-mcp-tools-prompts-agent-workflows-design.md | Service-backed tools, prompt templates, structured output policy, and agent workflow contracts | | codex-local-stdio-confi...
acceptanceCriteria: Review the Documents section in the source Markdown.

requirements.title: Reading Order
requirements.detail: Read docs/SPEC.md for the top-level product contract. Read 2026-06-15-phase-5-mcp-server-overview-design.md for Phase 5 invariants and dependencies. Read the target slice document before writing an implementation plan.
acceptanceCriteria: Read docs/SPEC.md for the top-level product contract.
Read the target slice document before writing an implementation plan.

approaches.name: Structured Stenc conversion
tradeoffs: Keeps the original Markdown as source evidence.
Adds generated JSON and styled pages for scanning and agent use.
approaches.recommendation: Use the Stenc JSON/page as a navigable view, and preserve the Markdown as the original document.

components.name: Overview
components.responsibility:
This folder holds detailed Phase 5 MCP server design documents that would make docs/SPEC.md too long if kept in the top-level contract.
docs/SPEC.md remains the canonical product and architecture contract. Files in this folder explain how Phase 5 should expose Vault Graph to agents through MCP while preserving the read-only, rebuildable, evidence-first boundary over Vault.

dataFlow: Original Markdown is converted into Stenc JSON and rendered as a deterministic static page.

errorHandling.behavior: Treat the original Markdown and docs/SPEC.md as the source of truth if generated Stenc content is ambiguous.

contracts.name: Overview
rules: Review the Overview section in the source Markdown.

validation.purpose: Validate the generated Stenc JSON source.

agentInstructions: Use docs/superpowers/specs/phase-5/README.md as the original spec text; this JSON is a structured Stenc view.
Preserve Vault Graph as read-only and rebuildable over Vault.
Read docs/SPEC.md before changing architecture, indexing, retrieval, graph, or context-pack behavior.
reviewChecklist: Original Markdown source remains present and unchanged.

selfReviewChecks.name: Source fidelity
selfReviewChecks.purpose: Confirm major headings, commands, code fences, and referenced files remain visible in Stenc fields.

selfReviewChecks.name: Repo boundary
selfReviewChecks.purpose: Confirm generated docs do not change Vault Graph runtime behavior or Vault content.

notes: Use the original Markdown source plus this Stenc page when preparing implementation work.
